news.t: Hashdex Nasdaq CME Crypto Index ETF (Ticker: NCIQ) Reduces Management Fee to 0.25%
Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US ETF (Ticker: NCIQ) Expands, Bringing US Investors Access to Five Leading Crypto Assets Through One Diversified Product
Hashdex Announces Launch of Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US ETF (Ticker: NCIQ), Offering US Investors Exposure to Bitcoin and Ether Through a Single Product

overview.description: The Hashdex Nasdaq CME Crypto Index ETF (NCIQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq CME Crypto Settlement Price index. The fund seeks to track a market cap-weighted index composed of bitcoin (BTH) and ether (ETH). It invests directly in the crypto assets and will not utilize leverage and derivatives. NCIQ was launched on Feb 13, 2025 and is issued by Hashdex.
infoTable: Nasdaq CME Crypto Settlement Price Index
